title: validator-result.v1
description: Machine-readable result emitted by every per-case validator. Written as JSON to the path given by the validator's --out argument (argv contract: <cmd> --case <case_dir> --workspace <workspace_dir> --out <result_path>). Embedded verbatim into run-manifest.v0 by the harness. Its repair_feedback drives the repair loop and must be derived only from failed checks and schema errors.

schema_version.description: Contract identifier; always the literal string "validator-result.v1".

case_id.description: Eval case id this result grades; kebab-case, prefixed with the skill name (matches the case's metadata.json id).

status.description: Overall verdict. "pass"/"fail" are graded outcomes; "error" means the validator itself could not complete (timeout, missing path, crash).

score.description: Scalar quality score in [0, 1]. For binary validators use 1.0 on pass, 0.0 on fail.

checks.description: Individual named checks the validator ran. Empty only when status is "error".

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier of the check (stable across runs so failures can be aggregated).

detail.description: Human-readable explanation of what was checked and, on failure, what was wrong.

repair_feedback.description: Actionable feedback strings for the model's repair loop, derived only from failed checks and schema errors. Empty when status is "pass".
